reviews.review_msg: Not much relevant real world experience.  Hypothetical and not relevant.

Best professor in a while. He talks in metaphors but he has a lot of industry experiences. He challenges you so that you can be prepared for the outside working world. He is very open to comments and keeps you thinking that there is no RIGHT answer. He is very organized gives feed back on your performances.

This is my first writing a comment for a prof. He is totally biased. He likes you, you are lucky. The person who did least work got the highest grade. It's very subjective marking,personally think it is very unfair.

Really cool guy and he cares about his students. My class has the best atmosphere ever! Feels like the real world and will prepare you for after grad. Great professor and provides you with invaluable information. I love his metaphor and sayings. 40% Presentation, 40% paper, and 20% part. If you don't participate at all, he will fail you so talk up!
Excellent prof. Knows what he is talking about...will prepare you for the real world. Will be taking his B2B class next sem!

Absolutely useless!  Speaks exclusively in cliches (try understanding that for 90 mins per day). No care for students - interested instead on being a media icon... Terrible professor who should have retired yesterday...
Interesting classes.  Knows material very well and teaches course material with easy to understand examples.
Best Prof I have had at SFU, if not the best prof ever. He tells you straight up like it is. Class isnt about fancy terms, its about using your brain. This is the way uni should be taught.

You do alot of talking in this course.  I wasn't too inclined to talk in lectures and actually only did about 2 times, alot less than most in the class.  I was worried about the participation aspect, since everything is subjectively marked in this course.  But I asked questions during presentations for every tutorial.. ended up with an A-.

One of the best professor ever! Uses real life applications and stimulates you to think.  He is a hard professor and expects a lot out of you, but what you learn in class far outweighs any possible trauma you might suffer.
Super nice guy, but he started to state questionable fact...makes you wonder if he actually knows what he is taking about.
He is an awesome teacher.  Very knowledgeable about the 'real' business world!!
States things like facts, but when investigated you'll find a stretched truth
He's never there at office hours. Nice guy, but not a very good teacher.
Can't teach. Never available during office hours, gives vague instructions.
